I8000C_ICD_3_CD I8000C_ICD_3_CD I8000C Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 3 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 3 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
326 I8000D_ICD_4_CD I8000D_ICD_4_CD I8000D Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 4 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 4 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
327 I8000E_ICD_5_CD I8000E_ICD_5_CD I8000E Additional
